task_completion.description: The Arch workbench is selected in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workbench dropdown menu in the top toolbar displays 'Arch' (or 'BIM', which includes Arch tools).

task_completion.description: A structural axis system is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An axis grid is visible in the 3D view, or 'Axis' / 'AxisSystem' objects are listed in the Tree View panel.

task_completion.description: Four structural columns are placed at the grid intersections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four vertical column-like structures are visible in the 3D view arranged in a rectangular layout, and/or four 'Structure' objects are present in the Tree View.

task_completion.description: Two structural beams are placed on top of the columns along the X-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two horizontal beam-like structures are visible in the 3D view, resting on top of the columns and running parallel to each other. Additional 'Structure' objects should appear in the Tree View.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as structural_frame.FCStd.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar or the root node in the Tree View displays 'structural_frame' or 'structural_frame.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeCAD graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD interface with toolbars, 3D view, and Tree View being actively used, rather than just a terminal or Python console.

integrity.description: The model was created progressively rather than via a single script execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows the model being built step-by-step (e.g., axes first, then columns, then beams) rather than appearing all at once.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The structural frame must be created in the Arch workbench. It requires an Axis System with 2 X-axes (4000mm interval) and 2 Y-axes (3000mm interval). There must be exactly 4 columns (200x200x3000mm) placed at the grid intersections at Z=0. There must be exactly 2 beams (200x300x4000mm) placed on top of the columns at Z=3000mm, oriented along the X-axis. The final file must be saved as 'structural_frame.FCStd'.
